name: Analogical Reasoning
definition: Mapping an underlying relation from one pair or structure to another.

name: Commonsense & Causal Reasoning
definition: Using everyday plausibility to infer causes, effects, or likely next events.

name: Contextual Recall
definition: Recovering details supplied in the local context without requiring new inference.

name: Deductive Reasoning
definition: Applying explicit premises or rules to reach a logically entailed conclusion.

name: Inductive Reasoning
definition: Inferring a rule or pattern from examples and extrapolating it.

name: Long-Term Knowledge Recall
definition: Retrieving stored factual knowledge not provided in the prompt.

name: Quantitative Reasoning
definition: Solving problems that require arithmetic, counting, or numerical comparison.

name: Semantic Relationship Comprehension
definition: Understanding roles, links, and relations among entities or concepts in text.

name: Spatial & Geometrical Reasoning
definition: Reasoning about layouts, shapes, positions, directions, distances, or geometry.

name: Temporal Reasoning
definition: Reasoning about ordering, simultaneity, duration, dates, or time markers.
